name: Clear-Wait: short 2-day delay + 15% transient price spike + 14-day stock cover
rubric_notes: Short delay (48h) vs 14-day cover. The 15% price spike is the temptation to act, but switching to a 10-12% premium alt to avoid a 15% spike is barely break-even — AND locks in a commitment that loses value if the spike reverts (commodity spot spikes often revert within days). No customer orders at risk. Confidence HIGH if the Arbiter distinguishes spot from structural pricing; MEDIUM if it treats the spike as if it were structural. The acceptable_suppliers list is empty per the wait-and-monitor framing.
